titleStmt.title: SII 16.124: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 124. (A.R. No. 34 of 1928.) YEṞṞAGUḌI, KALYANDRUG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying before the Rāmēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1464 (current), Plava, Jyēshṭha śu. 15, corresponding to A.D., 1541, June 8, (Wednesday).

Registers the confirmation of the dēvādāya and brahmādāya lands in the village Yaṟaguḍi in Būdiguṁṁa-sīma on their holders as sarvamānya by Bayyappa-Nāyaka on the same terms of settlement as in the time of Koṇḍamarasayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakha
varuṣaṁbulu 1464 Agunēṭi plava saṁva
tsara jēṣṭha śu 15 lu śrīmattu Acutadēvamahā
rāyalu pṛthivirājyaṁbu cēyagānu bayya
ppanāyaniAyyavāru būdiguṁma sīmalōni
yaraguḍi dēvādāya brahmādāyaṁ vāriki yicina
dharmaśāsanaṁ prāku koṁḍumarsayavāri kālāna naḍa
cina mānyālu rāmayadēvaraku rēgaḍi Ø4 varimaḍi Ø2 hanu
maṁtadēvaraku rēgaḍi Ø11 varimaḍi Ø1 girinātha dēvaraku vari
Ø1 pōturājuku rēgaḍi Û1 varimaḍi Û1 basavābhaṭlaku
rēgaḍi Ø1 varimaḍi Ø1 tirumalabhaṭluku rēgaḍi Ø1 bhāskara bha
ṭla rēgaḍi Û1 varimaḍi Û2 kēśavarājuku rēgaḍi Ø1 tiṁmayaku
rēgaḍi Û1 varimaḍi Û2 basavayaku rēgaḍi Ø1 varimaḍi
Û1 yī mānyēlu sarvamānyaṁgānu viḍistimi Iṁdku
yavaru tappinānu tama tallitaṁḍṟla vāraṇā
silō vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōduru gōha
tya braṁhmatya śēsina dōṣāna pōduru .
Digital edition of SII 16.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
